sections.title: Functions of Police
sections.content: The functions of Police include: keeping the peace, maintaining public safety, law enforcement, crime prevention, and emergency management.

sections.title: Principles of policing
sections.content: Police must act professionally, ethically, and with respect for human rights. Police must be accountable and maintain public confidence.

sections.title: Constables' powers
sections.content: A constable has all the powers, protections, duties, and responsibilities of a constable at common law and under any enactment.
